milestones: Learn data structures and control flow in Python
Master functions, modules, and file handling
Get familiar with libraries and frameworks
Build a simple project to integrate all learned concepts

dailyTasks.title: Introduction to Python
dailyTasks.description: Set up Python environment, learn about variables, data types, and basic syntax.

dailyTasks.title: Control Structures
dailyTasks.description: Understand conditional statements and loops (if, for, while).

dailyTasks.title: Data Structures
dailyTasks.description: Learn about lists, tuples, sets, and dictionaries.

dailyTasks.title: Functions
dailyTasks.description: Understand how to define and call functions, and learn about parameters and return values.

dailyTasks.title: Modules and Packages
dailyTasks.description: Learn how to import and use modules, and understand package management with pip.

dailyTasks.title: File Handling
dailyTasks.description: Learn how to read from and write to files in Python.

dailyTasks.title: Error Handling
dailyTasks.description: Understand exceptions and how to handle errors gracefully.

dailyTasks.title: Introduction to Libraries
dailyTasks.description: Get familiar with popular libraries like NumPy and Pandas.

dailyTasks.title: Data Analysis with Pandas
dailyTasks.description: Perform basic data analysis and manipulation using Pandas.

dailyTasks.title: Web Scraping with Beautiful Soup
dailyTasks.description: Learn the basics of web scraping and extracting data from websites.

dailyTasks.title: Introduction to Frameworks
dailyTasks.description: Get an overview of web frameworks like Flask or Django.

dailyTasks.title: Start Your Project
dailyTasks.description: Begin working on a simple project that utilizes what you've learned.

dailyTasks.title: Complete Your Project
dailyTasks.description: Finish your project, ensuring all features are working as intended.

dailyTasks.title: Review and Reflection
dailyTasks.description: Review what you've learned, seek feedback, and plan next steps for further learning.

successMetrics: Complete all daily tasks on time
Build and run a final project successfully
Demonstrate understanding through quizzes or coding challenges
challenges: Understanding complex concepts like libraries and frameworks
Maintaining motivation throughout the learning process
plan.motivationalApproach: Set small, achievable goals and reward yourself after completing each milestone. Join online communities for support, and share your progress to stay accountable.
